professor.name: Dr. Bharat Lohani
professor.title: Professor
professor.bio: Dr. Bharat Lohani is a Professor of Geoinformatics in the Department of Civil Engineering at the Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur). He is widely recognized as a leading expert in LiDAR (Light Detection and Ranging) technology, 3D laser scanning, and remote sensing within India. Alongside his academic contributions, Dr. Lohani is an entrepreneurial innovator who co-founded companies like Geokno India Pvt. Ltd. and SimDaaS Autonomy Pvt. Ltd. to transition geospatial research into industrial commercial applications.
fellowships: Fellow, Indian Society of Remote Sensing
